snippet.title: CHATORI BAHU 2 I चटोरी बहू 2 I OFFICIAL TRAILER I ANJANA SINGH I NEW BHOJPURI MOVIE 2026
snippet.description:
#anjanasingh #prashantsingh #ladomadhesiya #jyotimishra #Chatoribahu #anjanasinghfanpage #fortune #bhojpurimovie #bhojpuri #trailer #trending

IVY ENTERTAINMENT PRESENTS IN ASSOCIATION WITH 3R FILMS AND PRODUCTION 

Brand Partner – Fortune refined soyabean oil

फ़िल्म - 

कलाकार - अंजना  सिंह , प्रशांत  सिंह , लाडो मधेसिया  ,ज्योति  मिश्रा  , सोनाली  मिश्रा , अमर  कुश , अमित शुक्ला , रूपा  सिंह ,प्रकाश  जैस , सी.पी भट्ट  , सपना  यादव  .

बाल कलाकार - ढोलू , चाहत

कांसेप्ट - संदीप सिंह

निर्देशक – इश्तियाक़ शेख बंटी


लेखक - अरबिंद तिवारी


संगीतकार-  ओम झा

                                 गीतकार - अरबिंद तिवारी


संकलन - प्रीतम नायक

छायांकन - हरीश सावंत  
 
कोरियोग्राफर - सोनू प्रीतम

पोस्ट प्रोडक्शन- ऑय विज़न स्टूडियो (नागेंद्र यादव )

आर्ट डायरेक्टर - शिवा जयसवाल

निर्माता - संदीप सिंह, इश्तियाक़ शैख़ बंटी

 म्यूजिक – IVY MUSIC
सॅटॅलाइट और डिजिटल पार्टनर - B4U भोजपुरी




B4U क्रिएटिव टीम – 

मारुद शर्मा, नेहा उपाध्या, विशाल यादव


B4U लीगल - संदीप राणा , तृष्णा पटेल , पूनम शिंदे , आकांक्षा वाकोडे – मोरे

IVY – एंटरटेनमेंट -  फाइनेंस  

प्रदीप के दागा , जिनेले मैस्करेन्हास , विपुल जैन , निवृत्ति पाटिल, हिमांशु चौधरी

B4U - फाइनेंस

संतोष गर्ग , रविंदर साल्वी , शैलेश त्रिवेदी








                 FILM- CHATORI BAHU 2 
 

STARCAST-ANJANA SINGH, PRASHANT SINGH, LADO MADHESIYA ,JYOTI MISHRA , SONALI MISHRA, AMAR KUSH,AMIT SHUKLA, RUPA SINGH,PRAKSH JAIS, C.P BHATT , SAPNA YADAV .
CHILD ARTIST - DHOLU , CHAHHAT
CONCEPT – SANDEEP SINGH 
STORY- ARBIND TIWARI
DIRECTOR- ISHTIYAQUE SHAIKH BUNTY 
MUSIC DIRECTOR- OM JHA
LYRICS – ARBIND TIWARI 
EDITOR- PREETAM NAYAK 
CINEMATOGRAPHER- HARISH SAWANT 
CHOREOGRAPHER-SONU PRITAM 
ART DIRECTOR- SHIVA JAYSWAL 
POST PRODUCTION – EYE VISION STUDIO (NAGENDRA YADAV)

PRODUCER- SANDEEP SINGH, ISHTIYAQ SHAIKH BUNTY 
CO PRODUCER – NOORSABHA SHAIKH 
Music – IVY 
Satellite and Digital partner- B4U BHOJPURI

B4U CREATIVE TEAM 
MARUDA SHARMA ( E.P ), NEHA UPADHYAY, VISHAL YADAV 

B4U - LEGAL TEAM 
SANDEEP RANA , TRUSHNA PATEL , RAJVI SHIRODARIYA , POONAM SHINDE , AKANKSHA WAKODE

OFFICE BOY -  KANHAIYA JHA

IVY ENETERTAINMENT- FINANCE
PRADEEP K DAGA , JINELLE MASCARENHAS , VIPUL JAIN , NIVRUTTI PATIL , HIMANSHU CHAUDHARY

B4U – FINANCE TEAM
 SANTOSH GARG , RAVINDER SALVI , SHAILESH TRIVEDI 


Subscribe us - https://www.youtube.com/@b4ubhojpuri-
Follow us on Facebook - https://www.facebook.com/B4UBhojpuri/

https://youtu.be/WcjAWrHYUws

🔥 प्रस्तुत आहे एकदम धमाल अहिराणी मराठी कॉमेडी सॉंग 😍

snippet.title: Bhooth Bangla -Official Trailer| Akshay Kumar, Tabu, Paresh, Wamiqa, Priyadarshan |In Cinemas 16 Apr
snippet.description:
Welcome to Bhooth Bangla. Yahan na toh log normal hain... Aur upar se Bangla bhi paranormal hai. 
Enter at your own risk 🧟‍♀️

#BhoothBanglaTrailer out now

#BhoothBangla, paid previews begin in theatres 16th April 2026, 9 PM onwards 👻

When London-returned Arjun Acharya arrives in the sleepy town of Mangalpur to host his sister’s wedding at his newly inherited ancestral palace, he finds himself caught in a whirlwind of terrified locals, bizarre ghostly happenings, and hilarious chaos—until he begins uncovering the shocking truth behind the palace’s centuries-old legend.

Balaji Telefilms Ltd. in association with Cape Of Good Films present
Bhooth Bangla

Starring: Akshay Kumar, Paresh Rawal, Rajpal Yadav, Tabu, Wamiqa Gabbi, Jisshu Sengupta, Manoj Joshi, Mithila Palkar, Asrani Ji, Rajesh Sharma 
Directed by: Priyadarshan
Produced by: Akshay Kumar, Shobha Kapoor, Ektaa R. Kapoor
Co-producer: Vimal Doshi, Faara Sheikh, Vedant Vikaas Baali
Group CEO & CFO (BTL): Sanjay Dwivedi
Director of Photography: Divakar Mani
Story by: Aakash Kaushik
Screenplay by: Priyadarshan, Rohan Shankar, Abilash Nair
Dialogues by: Rohan Shankar
Music: Pritam
Lyrics: Yitendra Mishra & Kumaar
Co-Director: Abilash Nair
Editor: Aiyappan Nair M.S
Line Producers: Suresh Balaji & George Pius
Costume Designers: V Sai Babu, Dhanya Balakrishnan, Veera Kapur, Rimple & Harpreet
Sound Designers: Rajakrishnan & Shahaab Alam
Background Score: Ronnie Raphael
DI: Sri Sarathi Studios
DI Colorist: Vishnuvardhan
VFX: WRC Studio LLP
VFX Supervisor: Sidharth Priyadarshan
Production Designer: Sabu Cyril
Director of Choreography: Pony Verma, Ganesh Acharya
Group Commercial Head (BTL): Hamavvand Chwda
Head of Marketing (BTL): Raveena S Deshpaande
Post Production Head (BTL): Manohar Pandya
VP Licensing and Syndication (BTL): Ankit Chauhan
Commercial Head (BTL): Mitesh Bilakhia
Executive Producer: Pooja Tiwari Angarish
Publicity Designer: House of Awe
Media Consultant: Spice
Digital Agency: Everymedia
Visual Promotions: Just Right Studioz NX

#ZeeMusicCompany #PenMovies

snippet.title: Ginny Wedss Sunny 2 Official Trailer | Avinash Tiwary, Medha Shankr | Prasshant Jha | 24 April 2026
snippet.description:
The madness is back… and this time, it’s bigger, louder, and full-on #BawaalFamilyEntertainer

Ginny and Sunny return to a new phase of love, marriage, and family chaos. But when expectations clash, secrets unfold, and relatives get a little too involved… things spiral into a rollercoaster of emotions, laughter, and full desi drama.
Get ready for a sequel where love gets messier, families get louder, and every moment is pure entertainment.

Z Studios and Soundrya Production Present
A Soundrya Production Film
Ginny Wedss Sunny 2 In Cinemas 24th APRIL 2026

Credits 
Written and Directed by Prasshant Jha
Produced by Vinod Bachchan & Umesh Kumar Bansal  
Co- Producer – Manju Bachchan

snippet.title: #4 RANK TODAY? | CONQUEROR OR WHAT | BGMI + Xtreme 125R/160R Review
snippet.description:
LOLz Gaming is LIVE and ready to go full chaos mode!
Aaj ke stream mein lagne wali hai pure LOLz-style masti + BGMI domination —
crazy moments, clutch sprays, unexpected wipes, aur thoda sa unfiltered LOLz energy!
Upar se ek special bike feature breakdown bhi: Hero Xtreme 125R & Xtreme 160R 4V ka fun + honest review, bilkul LOLz ke style mein.
Agar aapko BGMI gameplay ke saath entertainment, real reactions aur bikes ka light-but-informative breakdown pasand hai…
toh yeh stream perfect hai!
🏍️ Hero Xtreme 125R – The Smart Mini Beast
* Dual Channel ABS — better stopping, better confidence
* Cruise Control — long ride = chill scene
* 3 Ride Modes — Eco | Power | Road
* 4.2” Multi-Colour LCD — clean & premium
🏍️ Hero Xtreme 160R 4V – The Fun Street Monster
* New LED Headlight — brighter, sharper look
* Cruise Control — relaxed high-speed riding
* 3 Ride Modes — Rain | Road | Sports
* 4.2” Multi-Colour LCD — bold & modern
🎮 Stream Highlights
😂 Funny in-game moments
🔥 Unexpected clutch plays
🎯 Clean spray transfers
🏍️ Easy-to-understand bike feature breakdown
💬 Chat vibes always on peak
Pinned comment mein test ride link mil jayega — check out karna mat bhoolna!
Like, Share & Subscribe for more LOLz Gaming moments ❤️⚡"

pagal horre the

pagal horre the

Muhh mod ke chalya tha mai
Tu rajji reh ise khattar rishta
Tod ke chalya tha mai

Barbaad ni hote ap jo zindgi me

pagal horre the

snippet.title: License Ka Asla - Licence | Masoom Sharma | Amar Karnawal
snippet.description:
Presenting the second video from Masoom Sharma’s ‘Licence’! Composed and sung by Masoom Sharma, it is written by Amar Karnawal and producer by Pinna Music. 

#Licence #Masoom Sharma #LicenceKaAsla

Song name: Licence Ka Asla
Singer: Masoom Sharma
Music Composer: Masoom Sharma
Lyricist: Amar Karnawal
Music Producer: Pinna Music

Masoom Sharma & Shakuntalam Film Production ‘Licence’ - Releasing On 24th April 2026 In Cinemas.

Star Cast - Masoom Sharma, Yashpal Sharma, Sapna Chaudhary, Kd Desi Rock, Rakhi  Lohchab, Nisha Sharma, Sunil Chitkara, Gori Nagori, Abhimanyu Yadav, Manish Kumar, Akash Chawaria, Kirti Satta, Rajkumar Dhankhar, Raman Nassa, Manvi Bhardwaj, Lucky Jahrila, Satish Georgy Kashyap, Ramesh Murti, Sid Sadanand, Deven Giroh, Narpender Sangwan, Satish Nandal, Divyansh Deshwal, Rahul Pandit, Jai Bhatia, Suren Savitri Sarkar, Ravinder Bajwan Anna, Sanju Hooda, Chirag Bansal, Samsher Singh Sam, Ashok Verma, Arpit, Nikki Dahiya, Desi Patarkar Dharmu, Anu Sardana.

Produced By - Shakuntlam Film Production
Writer & Director - Ranjeet Chauhan 
Associate Director - Girish Katyal

Lyrics:
Mahari ebbe sharafat dekhi sai fetange jis din bigdange , 
R mahrete k mahare saaye te bhi log ye darkai likdenge, 
Hum na hawabaaj r bande Or na chalchalan k gande r na karne faddu dhande baat sda syani rakhange 
Are dc n mardi mohar chladya aslya ka yo jor 
Bnadya bairi ka jo mor vo bande khani rakhange, 
Konya rhva kise t darkai rakha bandukhadi n bharkai, r jo sedhya uski karkai kunba ghaani rakhange... 

R jo khele khel jo loga n ve aapa khtam bnadyange, thamne to reel bnai se appa film bnadyange, 
Janta dekh k hoja bauli, barsai jb pital ki goli kheli jagi khoon ki holi pistal taani rakhange, 
Are dc n mardi mohar chladya aslya ka yo jor 
Bnadya bairi ka jo mor vo bande khani rakhange, 
Konya rhva kise t darkai rakha bandukhadi n bharkai, r jo sedhya uski karkai kunba ghaani rakhange... 

Are lehrande asle dikhenge r dikhenge sareaam bhagat, 
Bdhabad goli chalengi r chalengi sareaam bhagat, 
Re wepon khas mangau mota naam yamraj ka dhardu jhota kadhle goli khoon ek lota mot ki rani rakhenge, 
Are dc n mardi mohar chladya aslya ka yo jor 

Bnadya bairi ka jo mor vo bande khani rakhange, 
Konya rhva kise t darkai rakha bandukhadi n bharkai, r jo sedhya uski karkai kunba ghaani rakhange...

Letra da música:
Mahari ebbe sharafat dekhi sai hai jis din bigdange, 
R mahrete k mahare saaye te bhi log ye darkai likdenge, 
Hum na hawabaaj r bande Ou na chalchalan k gande r na karne faddu dhande baat sda syani rakhange 
São dc n mardi mohar chladya aslya ka yo jor 
Bnadya bairi ka jo mor vo bande khani rakhange, 
Konya rhva kise t darkai rakha bandukhadi n bharkai, r jo sedhya uski karkai kunba ghaani rakhange... 

R jo khele khel jo loga n ve aapa khtam bnadyange, thamne to reel bnai se appa film bnadyange, 
Janta dekh k hoja bauli, barsai jb pital ki goli kheli jagi khoon ki holi pistal taani rakhange, 
São dc n mardi mohar chladya aslya ka yo jor 
Bnadya bairi ka jo mor vo bande khani rakhange, 
Konya rhva kise t darkai rakha bandukhadi n bharkai, r jo sedhya uski karkai kunba ghaani rakhange... 

São lehrande asle dikhenge r dikhenge sareaam bhagat, 
Bdhabad goli desafio r desafio sareaam bhagat, 
Re wepon khas mangau mota naam yamraj ka dhardu jhota kadhle goli khoon ek lota mot ki rani rakhenge, 
São dc n mardi mohar chladya aslya ka yo jor 

Bnadya bairi ka jo mor vo bande khani rakhange, 
Konya rhva kise t darkai rakha bandukhadi n bharkai, r jo sedhya uski karkai kunba ghaani rakhange...

snippet.title: New Team Members? Can we survive the ‘Chip Thrills Challenge?’ 🥵 BGMI on the new #OnePlusNord6
snippet.description:
I teamed up with @TotalGaming093 @RaunaqRajani and @rohanjoshi8016 for a very spicy round of BGMI. Can the #OnePlusNord6 keep its cool while we definitely can't? Watch us struggle through the heat, attempt some high-level gameplay, and see who emerges as the champion!

The all-new OnePlus Nord 6 is now available starting at just ₹35,999! Click below and get yours:

https://www.amazon.in/dp/B0GRBBPBGQ?ie=UTF8&ref_=OnePlusNord6_newlaunch

Hey Guys, I’m Jonathan Amaral, better known as Jonathan Gaming, a professional BGMI esports athlete and streamer.

Since the start of my journey, my dedication to the game has been defined by precision, consistency, and an unstoppable grind. As an assaulter, I’ve built a reputation for clutch performances and high-impact gameplay, earning respect in the BGMI community. 

Through years of dedication, I’ve honed my skills, adapting to every challenge and evolving with the game. Whether in high-stakes tournaments or streaming for the gaming community, my focus remains the same - pushing the limits and delivering top-tier gameplay.

Redbull Athlete 🧢
BGIS 2025 Runner up 🥈
BGIS 2025 Finals MVP 👑
BMPS 2024 2nd Runner up 🥉
BGMS 2022 MVP 🏆
BGMS 2022 Runner up 🥈
BGIS 2021 Overall Top Fragger 🎯
PMWL #2 Overall Fragger 💣
PMCO Globals #4 Fragger 💣
PMPL 2020 Finals #2 Fragger 🎯
PMPL 2020 Finals Runner up 🥈
PMIS 2020 Top Fragger 🎯
PMIS 2020 India Champions 🏆
PMCO 2019 Fall Split SA Champion 🏆

snippet.title: Mutiny (2026) Official Trailer - Jason Statham
snippet.description:
In MUTINY, after witnessing his billionaire boss’s murder and being framed for the crime, Cole Reed (Jason Statham) boards a cargo ship on a one-man crusade to avenge his boss’ death only to discover an international conspiracy.

Lionsgate presents, a MadRiver Pictures and Punch Palace production.

es-US.title: Rebelión (2026) Tráiler oficial - Jason Statham
es-US.description:
En REBELIÓN, tras presenciar el asesinato de su jefe multimillonario y ser incriminado, Cole Reed (Jason Statham) se embarca en un carguero en una cruzada personal para vengar su muerte, solo para descubrir una conspiración internacional.

Lionsgate presenta una producción de MadRiver Pictures y Punch Palace.

hi.description:

snippet.title: Digital Circus Ep 9 Finale [TRAILER]
snippet.description:
Final episode of Digital Circus drops 19th June on YouTube and Netflix. It will be an hour long.
ALSO TADC: THE LAST ACT, an early movie screening airs from 4th June! TIX: https://digitalcircus.movie

localized.description:

es.title: The Amazing Digital Circus: Episodio 9 Final [TRAILER]
es.description:
El episodio final de The Amazing Digital Circus llega el 19 de Junio a YouTube y Netflix. Durará un total de una hora.

Además The Amazing Digital Circus: El Último Acto se estrenará antes en pantallas de cine desde el 4 de Junio: https://digitalcircus.movie

vi.title: Rạp Xiếc Kỹ Thuật Số Kỳ Diệu Tập 9 - Hồi Kết [TRAILER]
vi.description:
Tập cuối của Rạp Xiếc Kỹ Thuật Số Kỳ Diệu sẽ ra mắt vào ngày 19 tháng 6 trên
YouTube và Netflix. Và có thời lượng một tiếng.

NGOÀI RA, TADC: HỒI KẾT sẽ được chiếu sớm tại rạp từ ngày 4 tháng 6! Mua vé
tại: https://digitalcircus.movie

pt.title: Circo Digital Ep 9 Finale [TRAILER]
pt.description:
O último episódio do Incrível Circo Digital chega em 19 de Junho no Youtube e na Netflix. O Episódio terá uma hora de duração.

ALÉM DISSO: O ÚLTIMO ATO terá uma exibição cinematográfica a partir de 4 de Junho! Mais informações em: https://digitalcircus.movie

hi.title: डिजिटल सर्कस, एपिसोड ९: फिनाले [ट्रेलर]
hi.description:
डिजिटल सर्कस का आखरी एपिसोड १९ जून को यूट्यूब और नेटफ्लिक्स पर आ रहा है, जो कि एक घंटे का होगा।

लेकिन उससे पहले "दि अमेज़िंग डिजिटल सर्कस : अंतिम चरण" इस फिल्म का प्रसारण ४ जून से शुरू होगा।
फ़ौरन टिकट खरीदें https://digitalcircus.movie पर।

uk.title: ЦИФРОВИЙ ЦИРК Епізод 9 Фінал [ТРЕЙЛЕР]
uk.description: Фінальний епізод Цифрового Цирку виходить 19 червня на YouTube та Netflix - і це буде повноцінний годинний епізод. Ранній показ фільму ДЦЦ: ОСТАННІЙ АКТ стартує з 4 червня. Квитки: https://digitalcircus.movie

th.title: โรงละครดิจิตอล ตอนที่ 9 อำลาเวที [ตัวอย่างอย่างเป็นทางการ]
th.description:
บทส่งท้ายของโรงละครดิจิตอลฉายวันที่ 19 มิถุนายนบน Youtube และ Netflix มันจะมีความยาว 1 ชั่วโมง

แล้วก็ภาพยนต์ โรงละครดิจิตอล : องก์สุดท้าย จะฉายล่วงหน้าวันที่ 4 มิถุนายนนี้! 
ซื้อตั๋วได้แล้วที่: https://digitalcircus.movie

id.title: Digital Sirkus Ep 9 Finale [TRAILER]
id.description:
Episode terakhir Digital Sirkus tayang 19 Juni di YouTube dan Netflix. Dengan durasi 1 jam.

DAN JUGA TADC: THE LAST ACT bakal tayang lebih awal di bioskop mulai 4 Juni! DAPETIN TIKETNYA: https://digitalcircus.movie

en.title: Digital Circus Ep 9 Finale [TRAILER]
en.description:
Final episode of Digital Circus drops 19th June on YouTube and Netflix. It will be an hour long.
ALSO TADC: THE LAST ACT, an early movie screening airs from 4th June! TIX: https://digitalcircus.movie

ar.title: السيرك الرقمي الحلقة التاسعة والأخيرة [الإعلان التشويقي]
ar.description:
الحلقة 9 والأخيرة من السيرك الرقمي تُعرض في 19 يونيو على يوتيوب ونتفليكس، بمدة تمتد لساعة كاملة.

وقبل الإصدار، تُعرض الحلقة نفسها في صالات السينما ضمن تجربة خاصة بعنوان السيرك الرقمي المدهش: الفصل الأخير ابتداءً من 4 يونيو! التذاكر متاحة الآن: https://digitalcircus.movie

hu.title: Digitális Cirkusz Ep 9 Finálé [ELŐZETES]
hu.description:
A Digitális Cirkusz utolsó epizódja Június 19-én érkezik a Youtube-ra és Netflix-re. Egy óra hosszú lesz.

TOVÁBBÁ A CSODÁLATOS DIGITÁLIS CIRKUSZ: AZ UTOLSÓ FELVONÁS korai mozitermi vetítés Június 4-től az Egyesült Államokban, Kanadában és Latin-Amerikában! JEGYEK: https://digitalcircus.movie

ru.title: ЦИФРОВОЙ ЦИРК 9 СЕРИЯ: Финал [ТРЕЙЛЕР]
ru.description: Финальный эпизод Цифрового Цирка выходит 19 Июня на YouTube и Netflix. Длительностью в час. А так-же: Ранний показ фильма УЦЦ - ФИНАЛЬНЫЙ АКТ стартует 4го Июня! Билеты: https://digitalcircus.movie

nl.title: Digitale Circus Afl. 9 Finale [TRAILER]
nl.description:
De laatste aflevering van Digitale Circus verschijnt 19 juni op YouTube en Netflix. Hij duurt een uur lang.

Ook is TADC: DE LAATSTE AKTE vanaf 4 juni in de bioscoop als voorpremière te zien! Tickets: https://digitalcircus.movie

pl.title: CYFROWY CYRK Odc. 9 Finał [ZWIASTUN]
pl.description:
Finałowy odcinek Obłędnego Cyfrowego Cyrku wyląduje na Youtube i Netflix już 19 czerwca. Będzie trwać godzinę.

ALE przedpremierowe pokazy kinowe „TADC: THE LAST ACT” rozpoczynamy już od 4 czerwca! BILETY: https://digitalcircus.movie

fr.title: Digital Circus Ep 9 Final [TRAILER]
fr.description:
L'épisode final de The Amazing Digital Circus sort le 19 juin sur YouTube et Netflix. Il durera une heure.

DE PLUS, TADC : ACTE FINAL sera diffusé en avant-première au cinéma dès le 4 juin ! BILLETERIE: https://digitalcircus.movie

tr.title: Dijital Sirk 9. Bölüm (Final) [FRAGMAN]
tr.description:
Digital Circus’un final bölümü 19 Haziran’da YouTube ve Netflix’te yayınlanıyor. Bölüm 1 saat uzunluğunda olacak.

AYRICA TADC: THE LAST ACT erken film gösterimi 4 Haziran’dan itibaren Amerika'da başlıyor! BİLETLER: https://digitalcircus.movie

de.title: TRAILER: Der Unglaubliche Digitale Zirkus Flg. 9 (Finale)
de.description:
Die letzte Folge des digitalen Zirkus erscheint am 20. Juni auf YouTube und Netflix. Sie wird eine Stunde lang.
UND “DER UNGLAUBLICHE DIGITALE ZIRKUS: DER LETZTE AKT” wird ab dem 4. Juni in amerikanischen Kinos anlaufen! Tickets auf https://digitalcircus.movie

ja.title: アメイジング・デジタル・サーカス エピソード9 フィナーレ [予告映像]
ja.description:
「アメイジング・デジタル・サーカス」の最終エピソードが、YouTubeおよびNetflixで6月19日公開予定。なんと約1時間の長編です。

さらに、TADC: THE LAST ACT（アメイジング・デジタル・サーカス ザ・ラストアクト）が、6月4日から先行上映されます！チケットはhttps://digitalcircus.movieで！

zh.title: 《数字马戏团》第9集大结局【预告】
zh.description:
《数字马戏团》最后一集将于6月19日在YouTube和Netflix上线，时长为1小时。

此外，《神奇数字马戏团：最终篇》抢先版电影放映将从6月4日开始！购票链接：https://digitalcircus.movie

ur.title: ڈیجیٹل سرکس ایپیسوڈ 9 فائنل [ٹریلر[
ur.description:
ڈیجیٹل سرکس کا آخری ایپیسوڈ 19 جون کو یوٹیوب اور نیٹ فلکس پر ریلیز ہوگا۔ یہ ایک گھنٹے پر مشتمل ہوگا۔
اس کے علاوہ TADC: دی لاسٹ ایکٹ کی ارلی مووی اسکریننگ 4 جون سے شروع ہوگی! ٹکٹس کے لیے: https://digitalcircus.movie

ko.title: 디지털 서커스 9화 최종화 [트레일러]
ko.description:
디지털 서커스 최종화는 6월 19일 유튜브와 넷플릭스에서 공개됩니다. 러닝타임은 1시간입니다.

그리고 TADC: THE LAST ACT 선공개 극장 상영이 6월 4일부터 시작됩니다! 예매: https://digitalcircus.movie

nas nas kyu dukhei, nas nas kyu dukhe, nas nas kyu dukhei, piya meri nas nas kyu dookhei, nas nas kyu dukhi song, balam meri nas nas kyu dukhei , nas nas kyu dukhi song dj, nas nas kyu dukhi song dance, nas nas kyu dikhe song dj remix, nas nas kyu dukhe, braj bhasha song, braj songs, anjali raghav new song, anjali raghav nas nas kyu dukhe, piya meri nas nas dukhe song, nas nas kyu dukhe remix, new braj bhasha song, new brajbhasha song 2026.



Song Credits:
🎵 Song Title: Nas Nas Kyu Dukhei (नस नस क्यों दूखै)
🎭 Starring: Anjali Raghav & Diler Kharkiyay
🎤 Singers: Diler Kharkiya
📝 Lyrics: Kabir Singhora
🎼 Music: JPS Music


video credit 

ritika queen 
sharad shivhare 
Shoot with editing -patel


LYRICS: 
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Balam Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Na Hilo Jaye.. Na Chigo
Aaj Meri Chhati Si Toote
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei...

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Haan Gori Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Ja Sabre Gaam Me Top Lugai Bas Tu Hi Deekhe
Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...

Haan Ghar Te Nikru Saj Dhaj Ke
Moye Toke Log Lugai
Koi Radua Maare Siti
Dekh Koi Bolo Butterfly

Toye Laad Kare Je Ghar Kunve Ki
Sagri Chachi Tayi
Aur Naam Bata De Raduan Ko
Do Minute Me Karu Kutayi
Haan Tu Bhi Kare Na Laad Piya
Mope Daanti Si Meense

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Arey Bano Chaudhary Ghoome
Sab Din Mope Kaam Karave
Ho.. Phoonk Jaray Du Ghar Ghoore Ku
Aisi Mann Mein Aave

Arey Raakh Sabar Meri Dhanno
Kayko Tu Itni Ghabrave
Aur Lal Kilo Tere Naam Karay Du
Ek Ber Muskaye De
Moye Dekh Ke Devar Ek Aankh Te
Photo So Kheenche

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Piya Mero Jee So Cho Ghabrave
Rang Mero Neelo Padto Aawe
Baidh Bulaye De...
Jhaaro Jaldi Tu Moku Lagvaye De...

Mat Na Leve Tension Pyari
Tote Karu Laad Main Bhari..
Chhappar Phaar Kein...
Teri Nazar Utaaru Mantar Maar Kein..

snippet.title: Jab Talak (First Look) Shahid, Kriti, Rashmika | Pritam, Arijit Singh, Amitabh, Akasa | Cocktail 2
snippet.description:
WARNING ⚠️
This summer just got HOTTER🔥

#JabTalak first look out now

#DanceLikeNoOnesWatching #Cocktail2Song #MaddockFilms 

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

🎧 Song Credits 

➟ Featuring: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon and Rashmika Mandanna
➟ Music : Universal Music India and Mad For Mussic 
➟ Singer : Arijit Singh, Akasa
➟ Composer: Pritam Chakraborty
➟ Lyrics : Amitabh Bhattacharya 

Dinesh Vijan & Luv Ranjan presents #Cocktail2​, releasing in cinemas on 19th June, 2026

A Maddock Films & Luv Films Production

🎬 Video Credits

➟ Cast: Shahid Kapoor,  Kriti Sanon, Rashmika Mandanna 
➟ Directed By: Homi Adajania 
➟ Produced By: Dinesh Vijan, Luv Ranjan & Ankur Garg
➟ Written By: Tarun Jain & Luv Ranjan
➟ Co-Producers: Sharada Karki Jalota, Pooja Prem Patheja

➟ Director of Photography: Santhana Krishnan Ravichandran
➟ Original Song and Background Score: Pritam Chakraborty   
➟ Costume Designer: Anaita Shroff Adajania 
➟ Director of Choreography: Vijay A. Ganguly
➟ Publicity Design: Himanshu  & Rahul Nanda (H-one)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Lyrics:


(Main Naachun tab talak
Tu bole jab talak) ×4

Hai thoda besura par dil mein taal hai
Isko hum naachne se
tokein kab talak

(Main Naachun tab talak
Tu bole jab talak) ×4

Nachchaan aaj main shukar mana ke
Sone yaar tonh nazrein mila ke
Mainu lor kise di koi na
saare jag di laaj bhula ke

Chal mood banake sufi
Thodi kar lein bewakoofi
Choolhe mein jaaye mitra
Duniya bhar ki masroofi

Pairon ko par lagne se rokeon kab talak

(Main Naachun tab talak
Tu bole jab talak) ×4


ANTARA

Ve raanjha aag hai jitni idhar lagi
Tu bhi maan le dugni udhar lagi

Dono dil hi barabar jhulas gaye 
Pher.. jaan de kitni kidhar lagi

Ajj yaar de karke sadqe 
Maine pyale pyale gatke
Chal dekhein dil patri se
Aakhir kab tak na bhatke

Denge bhi ik dooje ko dhokhe kab talak..

(Main naachun tab talak
Tu bole jab talak) ×4

Behki jawaniyaan jaise barood hain
Dekhein uthte nahin hain 
Shole kab talak

(Main naachun tab talak
Tu bole jab talak) ×2

snippet.title: Matka King - Official Trailer | Vijay Varma, Kritika Kamra, Gulshan Grover | Prime Video India
snippet.description:
Prime Video India Presents
Matka King Official Trailer
Starring Vijay Varma, Kritika Kamra, Sai Tamhankar, Bhupendra Jadawat, Siddharth Jadhav, Gulshan Grover, Bharat Jadhav, Girish Kulkarni, Jamie Lever, Kishor Kadam, Cyrus Sahukar, Arpita Sethiya, Sambhaji Tangade, Ishtiyak Khan, Sanjivv Jotangia, Simran Ashwini
Produced by - Siddharth Roy Kapur, Nagraj Popatrao Manjule, Gargi Kulkarni, Ashwini Sidwani, Ashish Aryan
Created and Written by - Abhay koranne & Nagraj popatrao Manjule
Created & Directed by - Nagraj popatrao Manjule

Official Release Date - April 17, 2026 on Prime Video India

About:
Spanning the years 1964 to 1975, Matka King is the story of Brij Bhatti, an enterprising cotton trader who teams up with a disgraced ex-soldier and an upper-class widow to start a gambling game called ‘Matka’, turning an elite hobby into a parallel economy and an alternative system for a generation that feels let down by the country as it settles into life as a free republic.

Follow us on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/primevideoin/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PrimeVideoIN/
X: https://x.com/PrimeVideoIN

ABOUT PRIME VIDEO
Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages – including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal – The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime Video’s video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures – Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

snippet.title: Franklin Bought Spider-Man Kinder Joy for His Son… 😱🕷️ | GTA 5 Malayalam
snippet.description:
ഒരു ചെറിയ സന്തോഷത്തിനായി Franklin തന്റെ മകനായി Spider-Man Kinder Joy വാങ്ങി… 😢🕷️

പക്ഷേ അത് ഒരു സാധാരണ shopping day ആയിരുന്നില്ല…
ഒരു ചെറിയ കാര്യം വലിയ പ്രശ്നമായി മാറി 😱

Franklin, Shinchan എന്നിവർ ഒരു unexpected situation-ൽ കുടുങ്ങുന്നു…
അത് അവരെ ഒരു dangerous mission-ലേക്ക് നയിക്കുന്നു 🔥

👉 എന്താണ് ശരിക്കും സംഭവിച്ചത്?
👉 Kinder Joy തിരികെ കിട്ടുമോ?
👉 അവർ safe ആയി തിരികെ വരുമോ?

Full story അറിയാൻ video മുഴുവൻ കാണൂ ❤️

---

🎥 Action | Adventure | Mystery

snippet.title: Kamsahamnida Song Promo | Korean Kanakaraju | Varun Tej, Ritika | Merlapaka | Thaman S | Sid Sriram
snippet.description:
Presenting the promo of '#'Kamsahamnida'' from ''#KoreanKanakaraju'' starring Varun Tej,Ritika Nayak. Written & Directed by Merlapaka Gandhi . Music composed by Thaman S.

Mega Prince Varun Tej’s KOREAN KANAKARAJU is an upcoming INDO KOREAN HORROR COMEDY FILM, written and directed by Merlapaka Gandhi. Produced on an expansive scale by UV Creations and First Frame Entertainments with music by the sensational Thaman S. This project is set to deliver entertainment like never before. Joining the cast are the talented Satya and Ritika Nayak, promising a perfect blend of humour and drama.

#VarunTej #RitikaNayak #Satya #MerlapakaGandhi #ThamanS #ManojhReddy #UVCreations #FirstFrameEntertainments #LatestTeluguMovies2026 #VT15

snippet.description:

Presenting the second single "Pappali Pazhamey" from "Meesaya Murukku 2" starring Hiphop Tamizha and others. Directed and Composed by Hiphop Tamizha.

Production Manager: Vignesh Rathinam
PRO: Riaz K Ahmed, Paras Riyaz, Sathish (S2 Media)
Lyrical video by 404 studios

Lyrics: 
Pappali Palame 
Thakkali pola 
Pakkava nenja neeyum nasukuriye… 
Mittayi kadaye 
Pattasu nadaye 
Mittava manasula medhakuriye… 
Kalakuriye… ilukuriye… 
Napier-u bridge-ah neeyum minukuriye… 
Usuppuriye… Urukuriye… 
Nethu vecha meen kozhamba manakuriye… 
Hey Latchumi… Latchumi… Latchumi…  
Vandhu touch me… touch me… touch me… 
Nachunu… Nachunu… Nachunu…  
Thaa oru icch-u nee… icch-u nee… icch-u nee…  
Karukallu kavappu 
Annan dhaan da nawab-u 
Bagula thookinnu vandha Eduthuruvaar koluppu… 
Natpukku Madhippu 
Ekkachakkam irukku 
Kannalam katikinna thaana varum poruppu… 
Bodyguard-u junction-u 
Pakkathula Simson-u 
Gana vecha dhaan kala kattum namma function uh… 
Beach-u station-u 
bell-bottom fashion–u 
Kolaaru koduthakka eduthuruvom tuition-u… 
Idhu annanoda jilladi 
Pullaingalaam killadi 
Gana paatu innale Madras-u thaan munnodi… 
Idhu annanoda jilladi 
Pullaingalaam killadi 
Gana paatu innale namma Madras-u thaan munnodi 
Pappali Palame 
Thakkali pola 
Pakkava nenja neeyum nasukuriye… 
Mittayi kadaye 
Pattasu nadaye 
Mittava manasula medhakuriye… 
Kalakuriye… ilukuriye… 
Napier-u bridge-ah neeyum minukuriye… 
Usuppuriye… Urukuriye… 
Nethu vecha meen kozhamba manakuriye… 
Hey Latchumi… Latchumi… Latchumi…  
Vandhu touch me… touch me… touch me… 
Nachunu… Nachunu… Nachunu…  
Thaa oru icch-u nee… icch-u nee… icch-u nee…  
Latchumiiiiiiii…..

snippet.title: Alka Yagnik - Humsafar Ke Liye (Music Video) Sunny Deol, Reema Sen | Alka Yagnik | Jaal: The Trap
snippet.description:
Immerse yourself in the emotional and romantic melody "Humsafar Ke Liye" from the 2003 film Jaal: The Trap. Sung by Alka Yagnik, this soulful track captures the pain and beauty of love, separation, and longing. The music by Anand Raj Anand and heartfelt lyrics make it a touching experience for every romantic heart.

Credits: 
Singer: Alka Yagnik
Music: Anand Raj Anand
Lyrics: Sameer
Movie: Jaal The Trap
Starring: Sunny Deol, Tabu
Director: Guddu Dhanoa
Producer: Vinod Shah, Harish Shah
Label: Universal Music India

Lyrics:

हमसफर के लिए हमसफर मिल गया
 दिल को रोका मगर दिल गया, दिल गया
 रब तेरा शुक्रिया इस खुशी के लिए
 और क्या चाहिए जिंदगी के लिए
 हमसफर के लिए हमसफर मिल गया
 
 मैंने सोचा ना था प्यार हो जाएगा
 इस तरह से मेरा चैन खो जाएगा
 मैंने सोचा ना था प्यार हो जाएगा
 इस तरह से मेरा चैन खो जाएगा
 तुझ से नज़रें मिली, दिल धड़कने लगा
 तेरी चाहत में पागल तड़पने लगा
 मैंने तुझ को चुना आशिकी के लिए
 रब तेरा शुक्रिया इस खुशी के लिए
 और क्या चाहिए जिंदगी के लिए
 हमसफर के लिए हमसफर मिल गया
 
 मैंने हर सांस पे नाम तेरा लिखा
 धड़कनों पे भी पैगाम तेरा लिखा
 मैंने हर सांस पे नाम तेरा लिखा
 धड़कनों पे भी पैगाम तेरा लिखा
 तेरी बाहों में गुजरी है जो ये घड़ी
 है ये मेरे लिए तो युगों से बड़ी
 इश्क़ मैंने किया जिंदगी के लिए
 रब तेरा शुक्रिया इस खुशी के लिए
 और क्या चाहिए जिंदगी के लिए
 हमसफर के लिए हमसफर मिल गया
 I love you अजय, अजय I love you
 अजय, I love you
 अजय मैं खुशी के मारे पागल हो रही हूँ
 मेरे पांव हवा में पड़ रहे हैं अजय
 मैं उड़ रही हूँ, मुझे गिराने मत देना
 अजय, मत गिराने देना
 मुझे संभाल लेना अजय
 अजय, love you

Music video by Alka Yagnik performing Hamsafar Ke Liye (From "Jaal - The Trap" / Lyric Video).© 2026 Universal Music India Pvt. Ltd.

snippet.title: இசைஞானியின் தேநீர் விடுதி ராகங்கள் Volume 1 | Maestro Ilaiyaraaja | Tea Time Relaxing Melodies
snippet.description:
Step Into A World Of Nostalgia With The Timeless Melodies Of Ilaiyaraaja 🎶

“Isaignani’s Tea Kadai Classics” Brings You A Handpicked Collection Of Evergreen Tamil Hits That Feel Just Like Those Soulful Songs Playing In A Roadside Tea Shop. From Soothing Melodies To Heart-touching Tunes, Experience The Magic Of Maestro Ilaiyaraaja That Continues To Live In Every Music Lover’s Heart.
Sit Back, SIP Your Tea ☕, And Enjoy These Unforgettable Classics!

snippet.title: Khesari Lal New Song | Roti Garam | Namrita Malla | Shilpi Raj | New Bhojpuri Song | Bhojpuri Gana
snippet.description:
“रोटी गरम” में खेसारी लाल यादव, नम्रिता मल्ला और शिल्पी राज का धमाका छा गइल बा, फुल मस्ती और डांस के साथ अभी देखीं 🚀

Subscribe to our channel for more Bhojpuri Songs:
https://youtube.com/c/SaregamaHumBhojpuri

Audio Credits:
Singers: Khesari Lal Yadav & Shilpi Raj
Music Director: Ajay Singh AJ
Lyrics: Abhishek Babu Yadav (ABY)
Additional Vocal - Vipul Pandey , Gangesh Raja , Ajay Singh Aj

Video Credits:
Featuring: Khesari Lal Yadav & Namrita Malla
Video Design & Directed: Sooraj Katoch
DOP: Rahul Yadav
Choreographer: Shoki & Lokesh
Video Edit: Srikanth (ZAV Studio)
AD: Geeta Tamta (Zenith)
Costumes: Reema Katoch (Zai Fashions)
Dancers: Zenith Dance Troupe
Production: Rohit Seth (Zenith)
Associate: Alex
Asst.: Prince Yadav
Focus Puller: Anish
Makeup: Aryan Rajesh
Hair: Sonu
BTS: Chetan, Pujan (ZAV Studio)
Colourist: Govindpuria

Lyrics: 

कोरस:-
देखअ देखअ शर्मीली 
 म्यूजिक ...
देखअ देखअ शर्मीली शर्मीली रंगीली नशीली कटीली छबीली आ गईल आ गईल आ गईल आ गईल आ गईल 
हे हे हे ...

Chorus :-
 खुल के बतावअ गोरी कुछ ना छुपावअ गोरी 
सईया ने का का छुवा     ......आ
करअ तारु चोरा चोरी कइसे भइल जोरा जोरी
रतिया में का का हुआ .......    आ

Mukhda: - 
Male  :-
पहिला राती के बतिया बतावअ
बाटे किरिया तु कुछ ना छुपावअ -२

female -
होठवा के होठवा से देहिया के देहिया से 
रुई जैसा नरम किया 
सईया  मोरा सईया मोरा सईया 
नाही सरम किया  
जला के जोबन पे चूल्हा रोटी गरम किया 
खाली देखन में लागे भोला कुल्हि करम किया

Male: -
निर्दईया  निर्दईया निर्दईया तोहार बावे  पिया 
जला के जोबन पे चूल्हा रोटी गरम किया ..

Female :-
खाली देखन में लागे भोला कुल्हि करम किया ..


Antra: -1
chorus: -
धक धक का धक धक का धक धक जिया करे
जब आके मौका पाके उ कोरा भरे ...

Male: -
कइसे के नैना चार भइल 
कइसे शुरु राते प्यार भइल
कांचे कसइली रहल बदनिया 
कइसे फुला के अनार भइल

Female: -
अँखिया से अँखिया लड़ल रहे 
दिल में बेचैनी बढ़ल रहे 
चुम्मा लेवे में हाय रामा ढाढी गढ़ल रहे  -२
बलमा मोरा बलमा मोरा बलमा बेशरम पिया
जला के जोबन पे ...

Antra: -2
Chorus: -
क ख ग घ पढ़लू ह का 
नाईट फलाइट पे चढ़लू ह का 

Male: -
धीरे धीरे कइसे सीन भइल 
मामला कब रंगीन भइल 
रसगुल्ला जइसन मीठ मीठ  देहिया
कइसे ए  गोरी नमकीन भइल 

Female  :-
कनवा के बाली टूट गईल
होठवा के लाली छुट गईल
फुलवा के डाली पाके भवरा लूट गईल -२
(हम अनाड़ी )
उई मा उई मा उई मा नाही मरम दिया 
जला के जोबन पे चूल्हा...

#rotigaram
#khesarilalyadav 
#namritamalla 
#shilpiraj 
#mungda 
#newbhojpurisong 
#newbhojpurigana

Facebook: https://bit.ly/3FxwPgo 
Instagram: https://bit.ly/32rkJqM
X: https://x.com/saregamaglobal

snippet.title: Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha | मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधाअपने वृंदावन को | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan
snippet.description:
Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha | मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधाअपने वृंदावन को | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan
Radha Rani Ke Charnon Mein | मोहे मोर बनाइयो राधा | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha | Radha Krishna Bhajan
मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan

#radhakrishna #radhabhajan #krishnabhajan #radharani 
मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा
mohe brij ko baniyo mor
राधे मोहे ब्रज को बनाइयो मोर
mohe mor banaiyo radha apne vrindavan ko
mohe mor banaiyo radha apne vrindavan ka
mohe mor banaiyo radha kratika thakur
mohe mor banaiyo radha ringtone
mohe mor banaiyo radha apne
mohe mor banaiyo radha rani
mohe mor banaiyo radha apne vrindavan ko song
mohe mor banaiyo radha bhajan
mohe mor banaiyo radha radha
mohe mor banaiyo radha film
mohe mor banaiyo radha apne vindavan ko bhumika sharma
radha hit bhajan mohe mor banaiyo radha, mohe mor banaiyo to banaiyo vrindavan ko, peaceful radha krishna bhajan, mohe mor banaiyo radha, mohe mor banaiyo bhajan, farmani naaz mohe mor bhanaiyo radha, मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा, मोहे मोर बनाइय्यो राधा, radha krishna bhajan, radha krishna bhajan 2026, mohe mor banaiyo farmani naaz, mohe mor banaiyo to banaiyo, aagle janam radha morni banaiyo, mohe mor banaiyo, popul;er bhajan mohe mor, aagle janam radha sadhu banaiyo, aagle janam radha bander banaiyo, 

Lose yourself in the sacred lanes of Vrindavan with this soulful rendition: "Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha." This Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan captures the deep desire of a devotee to become a peacock in the gardens of Nidhivan, just to be close to Radha Rani and Krishna.

मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा - वृंदावन की इस पावन धुन में खो जाएँ।  Bhakti आपके लिए लेकर आया है श्री राधा-कृष्ण की महिमा का एक ऐसा भजन जो आपके हृदय को शांति और आनंद से भर देगा।

यह मधुर और भावपूर्ण Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan ब्रज की पावन भावना और राधा-कृष्ण के दिव्य प्रेम को समर्पित है।
“मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधाअपने वृंदावन को” – यह पंक्ति भक्त की उस विनम्र प्रार्थना को दर्शाती है, जहाँ वह ब्रजधाम में मोर बनकर भी राधा-कृष्ण के चरणों में रहना चाहता है।

यह भजन ध्यान, जप, सुबह-शाम की पूजा, वृंदावन भक्ति, कीर्तन और मन की शांति के लिए अत्यंत उपयुक्त है। इसकी शांत धुन और प्रेमपूर्ण शब्द आत्मा को सुकून देते हैं और मन को वृंदावन की गलियों में ले जाते हैं।

Vrindavan Essence: Experience the 'Brij Ras' from the comfort of your home.

Soulful Peace: Perfect for morning meditation or evening relaxation.

📌 Keywords: Mohe Mor Banaiyo To Banaiyo Vrindavan Ko, मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा, Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan, Vrindavan Bhajan, Radha Krishna Song 2026, Bunty Thakur Bhajan, Krishna Meditation Music, Radha Rani Bhajan, Braj Bhakti Song

🎶 Munda Sardar – A powerful and energetic track from the upcoming Punjabi film Khushkhabri!

snippet.description:
## 🖐️ Welcome Back to GTA Dharshan!

**Description:**

In this video, Franklin enters a terrifying **Magic World** to face off against the legendary **Evil Nun** and the powerful **Trover** in an epic Boss Battle! 🧙‍♂️✨ The stakes are higher than ever—they are fighting for **Franklin's Soul**. Can he survive the dark magic and escape this nightmare, or will he be trapped forever? 😱

Watch the full gameplay to see the incredible powers, magic spells, and the final showdown!

### ✨ What’s in this video?
 * **Action-Packed Magic Battle**
 * **Evil Nun vs Franklin**
 * **Trover Boss Fight**
 * **Tamil Commentary**

### 📢 Support the Channel:
If you enjoyed this video, don't forget to:
✅ **Like** the video
✅ **Subscribe** to **GTA Dharshan** for more crazy GTA 5 mods and stories!
✅ **Comment** below which boss was the hardest to beat!
✅ **Share** with your friends!

snippet.title: గోవింద నామాలు ఒక్కసారి వింటే అదృష్టం మొదలవుతుంది🙏 | Venkateswara Swamy Songs | Govinda Namalu Telugu
snippet.description:
గోవింద నామాలు ఒక్కసారి వింటే అదృష్టం మొదలవుతుంది🙏 | Venkateswara Swamy Songs | Govinda Namalu Telugu


Listen to the divine Govinda Namalu With Telugu Lyrics, a powerful devotional chant dedicated to Lord Venkateswara Swamy (Balaji). Chanting Govinda Namalu and Om Namo Venkatesaya brings peace, prosperity, and divine blessings into your life. This sacred Venkateswara Swamy Devotional Song is highly beneficial for daily prayer, meditation, and spiritual growth.

In this video, you can experience the soulful recitation of Sri Govinda Namalu Telugu with clear lyrics, making it easy to follow and chant along. Listening to these powerful Tirumala Balaji Bhakti Songs helps remove negativity, reduce stress, and attract success and positivity.

snippet.description:
😂 Granny vs Poppy Playtime 5 - Hilarious Horror Comedy Short Film!

This is a full comedy short film parody where a boy named Rob lives with Granny and Grandpa. Chaos begins when Poppy Playtime characters suddenly come to their house! Pure acting, funny skits, over-the-top reactions and laugh-out-loud moments — NOT gameplay!

If you love Granny horror game parodies mixed with Poppy Playtime Huggy Wuggy madness turned into comedy, this one is pure masti! 🤣 Granny Grandpa vs Poppy Playtime gone completely wrong!

🎵 Song Title: Nas Nas Kyu Dukhei (नस नस क्यों दूखै)
🎭 Starring: Anjali Raghav & Karan Chaudhary

video credit 

ritika queen 
sharad shivhare 
Shoot with editing -patel


LYRICS: 
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Balam Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Na Hilo Jaye.. Na Chigo
Aaj Meri Chhati Si Toote
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei...

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Haan Gori Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Ja Sabre Gaam Me Top Lugai Bas Tu Hi Deekhe
Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...

Haan Ghar Te Nikru Saj Dhaj Ke
Moye Toke Log Lugai
Koi Radua Maare Siti
Dekh Koi Bolo Butterfly

Toye Laad Kare Je Ghar Kunve Ki
Sagri Chachi Tayi
Aur Naam Bata De Raduan Ko
Do Minute Me Karu Kutayi
Haan Tu Bhi Kare Na Laad Piya
Mope Daanti Si Meense

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Arey Bano Chaudhary Ghoome
Sab Din Mope Kaam Karave
Ho.. Phoonk Jaray Du Ghar Ghoore Ku
Aisi Mann Mein Aave

Arey Raakh Sabar Meri Dhanno
Kayko Tu Itni Ghabrave
Aur Lal Kilo Tere Naam Karay Du
Ek Ber Muskaye De
Moye Dekh Ke Devar Ek Aankh Te
Photo So Kheenche

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Piya Mero Jee So Cho Ghabrave
Rang Mero Neelo Padto Aawe
Baidh Bulaye De...
Jhaaro Jaldi Tu Moku Lagvaye De...

Mat Na Leve Tension Pyari
Tote Karu Laad Main Bhari..
Chhappar Phaar Kein...
Teri Nazar Utaaru Mantar Maar Kein..

snippet.title: I Played Riders Republic Like an Idiot! 🤣
snippet.description:
I Played Riders Republic Like an Idiot! 🤣
Riders Republic Malayalam Gameplay

📩 Business & Promotions : pfdesuza@gmail.com

About The Game
Riders Republic is a fast-paced extreme sports game where you can ride, fly, and compete across a massive open world filled with mountains, forests, and national parks. In this Malayalam gameplay video, we jump into high-speed bike races, perform insane stunts, glide through the air with wingsuits, and experience the chaos of a vibrant multiplayer world. The game combines multiple sports like biking, snowboarding, skiing, and wingsuit flying, giving you complete freedom to explore and play your way.
With its huge open map, smooth traversal, and nonstop adrenaline, Riders Republic delivers an exciting experience whether you’re racing against players, pulling off crazy tricks, or just exploring the world. If you enjoy open-world sports games, multiplayer racing, and high-energy gameplay, this is a must-watch.
  
00:00 - Intro
00:43 - Gameplay
10:34 - Racing 

#ridersrepublic #malayalamgameplay #gaming #gameplay #pfdesuza

A powerful Punjabi song packed with attitude, desi swag & cinematic video 🔥

snippet.title: Kotyach Saaj | कोट्याचं साज | Adarsh Shinde | Hrushi B | VijayaAnandMusic
snippet.description:
क्रांतीचा वारसा, शिंदेशाहीचा आवाज
‘कोट्याचं साज’ 👑

A heartfelt tribute filled with pride and deep emotion, “Kotyach Saaj” pays homage to the eternal legacy of Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar 💙
Brought to life with soul-stirring vocals by Adarsh Shinde and beautifully crafted by
 Hrushi B.

VijayaAnandMusic Presents 
कोट्याचं साज “Kotyach Saaj”

Singer - Adarsh Shinde

snippet.title: FALCON : Lakhi Ghuman | Jang Dhillon | Bhindder Burj | Latest Punjabi Songs 2026 | New Punjabi Song
snippet.description:
🔥 FALCON – Lakhi Ghuman 🔥

Presenting the official track *“FALCON”* by **Lakhi Ghuman**, a powerful song that brings high-energy vibes, bold lyrics, and a striking visual experience. This track captures attitude, ambition, and the fearless spirit of rising above all limits—just like a falcon soaring in the sky. 🦅

Singer and Composer: Lakhi Ghuman
Lyrics: Jang Dhillon
Music: Hammy Mangat
Mix and Master: Dense
Story, Screenplay and Director: Bhindder Burj
DOP: Jason Numberdar
Associate: Pal Mahla 
Chief AD: Gurie Madahar, Mani DC, Akash Sandhu
Art: Rajan Arts
Jib Operater: Munish
Costume: Rajat Manchanda
Editor: Cuts by Nav
Colorist: Fateh Sidhu

Label: LeafRecords 
Email: info@leafrecords.ca
Phone: +14034022596

👉 Don’t forget to Like, Comment & Share
👉 Subscribe for more latest Punjabi music

#Falcon #LakhiGhuman #LeafRecords #PunjabiMusic #NewSong #TrendingNow #MusicVideo


FALCON : Lakhi Ghuman | Jang Dhillon | Bhindder Burj | Latest Punjabi Songs 2026 | New Punjabi Songs 2026

#newpunjabisong #latestpunjabisongs 

Song Lyrics

Aayu russia ton fauj hona yudh jiddne
Khoon naal ghoreyan de pour bhijjne 
Vidhi da vidhaan kehda taalu kalnu 
Sees sidhe hongey guraan de vall nu 
Yodheya nu dhuro jadon haaka vajjiyan 
Tanka vangu aungiya range aan laddiya 
Degh tegh fateh da jaikaara gunjuga 
Sikh raaj dekheyo dbaara gunjuga 
Dj aan te santaan di speech chalugi 
Rani jinda chithiyan dbaare ghallugi 
Ladhi fer dulla jammu taahli naalda
Hoyu jathedaar phoola seyon akalli naalda 
Kamm laye jaangey kanoon sakht ton
Dand ditte jaangey akal takht ton
Kalyug vahno vaahni doud jauga 
Jaffi poun jagrawa nu lahore ayuga 
Hikk thok kehne a sure ayuga 
Dahdeyan dmalleyan da dor aauga........3x

Murh parne te pagga dihniyaa panjab nu 
Har dhoun jhukugi nishaan sahib nu 
Laike daang naal kohinoor taj aungey
Bahron chobra de bhre hoye jhaaj aungey 
Gutta te sarbh loh de karhe hongey 
Drawing room asle naal bhare hongey 
Raj laine jaane saddi koum kinga di 
Bordera te fouj hoyu nihang singha di 
Oye boond v ni dinde vicho sadde paaniya 
Har banda kanth karu panj baaniya 
Pairan thalle choudra jwani middugi 
Ghro ghri chulleya te degh rijjugi 
Jagngey chehre anna jor ayuga
Ik do ni khalsa crore auga 
Kyunki ajj de sme di vaddi lorh ayuga 
Dahdeyan dmalleyan da daur ayuga .....3x 

O do ghari dekh jihnu sher darje 
Honey kadd kirdaar naluye de argey 
Hun jadon hoyi honi jang end di 
Parhke turangey vaar banda singh di 
Jis vele yudh da biggal gajj geya 
Os wele dsangey ki time vajgeya
Hr maa da putt urha joorha sahmbuga 
Kesri te rang neela goorha sambhuga 
Aayu oho time jehda mitt hunda si 
Goreya de tera sadda ik hunda si 
Raj hona sadda saddey rule hongey 
Sikhi de sidhanta te school hongey 
Kdo kiwe hoya si birth dsangey 
Asal akali de arth dsangey 
Murhpey ghara nu jadon putt morhe te 
Din charey kharkhra firu ghorey te 
.........

O nwe munde jadon kissa kaav parhgey 
Jamngey fer jagge jeoney varge
Raggi dhadhi jadon sikh raj goungey 
Charhtey de potrey jhe yaad aungey 
Kisse parsang lohri maghi sunage 
Deya singh dilbar dhadi sunage 
Sukhe jinde yodheya de mele laawage 
Bhai nirmal choley ali jaggo gawangey 
Raja oh nikamma jihda raj na rawe
Kaum kaahdi jihda raaj bhaag na rwe
Aisa jang dhillon likhi ke anand a jwe 
Sunke sareero looyi kandeya jwe 
Hor kinne likhngey tenu dekhke
Rakh tu purhainiya kalam ret ke 
Sach jadon likhe ithihaas hongey 
Fer asal azadi de ehsaas hongey 
Pata lagju smey nu koohni morh ayuga 
Dekhi hathi ali turya oh tor ayuga 
Jehda khalsa a raj o pure ayuga ......

Pairan thalle choudra jwani middugi 
Ghro ghri chulleya te degh rijjugi 
Jagngey chehre anna jor ayuga

Os wele dsangey ki time vajgeya

Kesri te rang neela goorha sambhuga

Asal akali de arth dsangey 
Murhpey ghara nu jadon putt morhe te 
Din charey kharkhra firu ghorey te 
.........

O nwe munde jadon kissa kaav parhgey 
Jamngey fer jagge jeoney varge
Raggi dhadhi jadon sikh raj goungey 
Charhtey de potrey jhe yaad aungey 
Kisse parsang lohri maghi sunage 
Deya singh dilbar dhadi sunage 
Sukhe jinde yodheya de mele laawage 
Bhai nirmal choley ali jaggo gawangey 
Raja oh nikamma jihda raj na rawe
Kaum kaahdi jihda raaj bhaag na rwe
Aisa jang dhillon likhi ke anand a jwe 
Sunke sareero looyi kandeya jwe 
Hor kinne likhngey tenu dekhke
Rakh tu purhainiya kalam ret ke 
Sach jadon likhe ithihaas hongey 
Fer asal azadi de ehsaas hongey

snippet.title: Apna Bana Le 💖 | 8K Ultra HD | Arijit Singh | Bhediya | Kriti Sanon, Varun Dhawan | @BollywoodIn8K
snippet.description:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=odVG3E8I-yE&list=PL8dhvzDCUY12gBhKLDxfPLjUGM10SF_v0 - 8K Songs Just Out on @BollywoodIn8K 

👉🏻 SUBSCRIBE to Bollywood In 8K - https://www.youtube.com/@BollywoodIn8K

Experience the magical romance of “Apna Bana Le” from Bhediya in stunning 8K Ultra HD resolution. Featuring Varun Dhawan & Kriti Sanon, this soulful love song is beautifully sung by Arijit Singh, composed by Sachin-Jigar, and written by Amitabh Bhattacharya.

Song: Apna Bana Le
Singers: Arijit Singh & Sachin-Jigar
Music: Sachin-Jigar
Lyrics: Amitabh Bhattacharya
Programmed & Arranged by: Himonshu Parikh & Sachin-Jigar
Assistant Programmer: Shirish Prakash Singh
Backing Vocals: Rana Mazumdar, Rishikesh Kamerkar, Nueman Pinto, Maanuni Desai & Pratiksha Kale
Guitars: Himonshu Parikh
Flute: Tejas Vinchurkar
Bass Programmed by: Harshit ''HashBass'' Mishra
Music Production Head: Romil Ved

pa.title: ਮੈਂ ਮਾਇਨਕਰਾਫਟ ਵਿੱਚ ਪ੍ਰੋਟੋਟਾਈਪ ਵਜੋਂ 100 ਦਿਨ ਜਿਉਂਦਾ ਰਿਹਾ।

ਮੇਰੇ ਨਾਲ ਮਾਇਨਕਰਾਫਟ ਖੇਡੋ ਅਤੇ ਵੀਡੀਓਜ਼ ਵਿੱਚ ਸ਼ਾਮਲ ਹੋਵੋ! 😝 ਇੱਥੇ 'ਸ਼ਾਮਲ ਹੋਵੋ' ਬਟਨ 'ਤੇ ਕਲਿੱਕ ਕਰੋ ▶

🎮 ਮੇਰਾ ਮਾਇਨਕਰਾਫਟ ਸਰਵਰ ਪਤਾ: play.eyserver.com
ਤੁਸੀਂ ਇਸ ਸਰਵਰ ਨੂੰ ਬੈਡਰੋਕ ਐਡੀਸ਼ਨ (ਫੋਨ, ਕੰਸੋਲ ਅਤੇ ਟੈਬਲੇਟ) ਅਤੇ ਜਾਵਾ ਐਡੀਸ਼ਨ (ਪੀਸੀ ਅਤੇ ਮੈਕ) 'ਤੇ ਸ਼ਾਮਲ ਕਰ ਸਕਦੇ ਹੋ

📷 ਇੰਸਟਾਗ੍ਰਾਮ: https://direct.me/eystreem

💙 ਅੱਜ ਦੇ ਵੀਡੀਓ ਨੂੰ ਪ੍ਰੇਰਿਤ ਕਰਨ ਲਈ ਇਹਨਾਂ ਸ਼ਾਨਦਾਰ ਸਿਰਜਣਹਾਰਾਂ ਦਾ ਬਹੁਤ ਧੰਨਵਾਦ ਅਤੇ ਕ੍ਰੈਡਿਟ: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1_UilMRDHRNSZ3VyzxhW0fQ6_T5GfizFUlMGCI20vPGI/edit?usp=sharing

snippet.title: ✨ जब कोई साथ ना दे 💙 | श्री राधा रानी के प्यारे भजन | Premanand Ji Maharaj Bhajan | Krishna Bhajan 🌸
snippet.description:
#radharani #premanandjimaharaj #krishnabhajan

👉 जब जिंदगी में कोई साथ ना दे…
👉 जब दिल अकेला महसूस करे…

तब एक ही सहारा होता है —
👉 राधा रानी 💖

🌸 ये Radha Rani Bhajan Collection
👉 मन को शांत करता है
👉 दिल को सुकून देता है
👉 और अंदर विश्वास जगाता है 💫

🎧 बस Play करें…
👉 और खुद महसूस करें…

🎶 🎼 भजन सूची (हिंदी में)

1️⃣ राधे तेरे चरणों की
2️⃣ सांसों की माला पे सिमरूं मैं
3️⃣ मेरी विनती यही है राधा रानी
4️⃣ ओ कान्हा अब तो मुरली की
5️⃣ राधे कृष्णा राधे श्याम
6️⃣ नाम है तेरा तारन हारा
7️⃣ तेरा किसने किया श्रृंगार सांवरे
8️⃣ लगन तुमसे लगा बैठे
9️⃣ छोटी छोटी गैया छोटे छोटे ग्वाल
🔟 मेरे सरकार आए हैं
1️⃣1️⃣ अधरम मधुरम (मधुराष्टकम)

💬 Like 👍 Share 🔁 Comment 💖

👉 Comment: “राधे राधे 💙”

🎧 Devotional Music

snippet.title: BEZAF - Saad Lamjarred | Neha Kakkar | Shehnaaz Gill | Rajat Nagpal | Charif Bennis | Anshul Garg
snippet.description:
Anshul Garg presents Bezaf featuring Saad Lamjarred & Shehnaaz Gill.

Streaming link 👉🏼 https://VirginMusicGroup.lnk.to/Bezaf

Audio Credits :-
Singer : Saad Lamjared & Neha Kakkar 
Music Composer : Charif Bennis & Rajat Nagpal 
Lyrics : Saad Lamjarred, Charif Bennis & Rana Sotal
Music Producer : Tarik Lahjaily
Flute : Adil charfi   
Music arrangement : Tarik lahjaili

Video Credits :-

G.lamjarred

Karim bennis
Faisal laatik

Special Thanks : Virgin Music India

https://www.virginmusic.com/

Virgin Music India Team :-
Head : Amit Sharma 
Team : Nagesh Jadhav, Kajal Israni, Amol Suryavanshi, Lavanya Das & Nishtha Sikroria

Travel and Hospitality Partner : PRM Hospitality

Lyrics :-
Raaton may jagaye mujhey khaab tere ,,
Raanjhay mere ,,o mirzay mere
Bhar bahrke chalku pyaar may tere,,Pyaar may tere
Raanjhay mere ,,o mirzay mere ,,

Nhebbek bzaaf, hbeitak bzaaf
W ghnhebbek bzaaf
Bhal zinek l’lam ma shaf
(I love you so much, I’ve loved you deeply,
And I’ll always love you.
Your beauty is unmatched in the world.)

Jag tu mera ,,
Rab tu mera ,,
Qismat barkat ,,
Sab tu mera ,,

Ajaz lesani
Ma khallali manqool
Allil aliya tool sahraan
Khallani sahraan khallani
(I’m at a loss for words,
There’s nothing left unsaid.
The night stretches long,
Leaving me awake, leaving me restless.)

-Ya njoum samaa
Bghito ana mn awal kelma
Haqiqa mashi hlema
F’tariqo rah dani
(Oh stars in the sky,
I sought you from the very first word.
A truth, not a dream,
Your path led me here.)

Saans hai tumse ,,
Aas hai tumse,,
Chahat ki har ,,
Pyaas hai tumse ,,

Nhebbek bzaaf, hbeitak bzaaf
W ghnhebbek bzaaf
Bhal zinek l’lam ma shaf
(I love you so much, I’ve loved you deeply,
And I’ll always love you.
Your beauty is unmatched in the world.)

Mera shingaar tu ,,
Hm ranihaar tu,,
Aaja piya aaja 
Najar utaar du ,,

Karti hai ishaaray ,,
Kispe dil haare ,,
Yeh paayal puchay,,
Hai tere baare ,,
Hai tere bare ,,

AyAmi li fatet kablek maliha maana 
Chkoun yjini fhalek ya momo ayniya…momo ayniya 
Ya jamalek ya jamalek ….
(My days before i met you… had no meaning,
Who could ever be like you, oh delight of my eyes ?!
Allah … your beauty Oh god your beauty is unbelievable I never saw like it before …) 

Nhebbek bzaaf, hbeitak bzaaf
W ghnhebbek bzaaf
Bhal zinek l’lam ma shaf
(I love you so much, I’ve loved you deeply,
And I’ll always love you.
Your beauty is unmatched in the world.)

Saans hai tumse ,,
Aas hai tumse,,
Chahat ki har ,,
Pyaas hai tumse ,,

Nhebbek bzaaf, hbeitak bzaaf
W ghnhebbek bzaaf
Bhal zinek l’lam ma shaf
(I love you so much, I’ve loved you deeply,
And I’ll always love you.
Your beauty is unmatched in the world.)

Jag tu mera ,,
Rab tu mera ,,
Qismat barkat ,,
Sab tu mera ,,

Nhebbek bzaaf, hbeitak bzaaf
(I love you so much, I’ve loved you deeply)

Qismat barkat ,,
Sab tu mera ,,

#Bezaf #saadlamjarred #nehakakkar #shehnaazgill #newsong #international #viral #trending

snippet.title: Braj Ras (Official Video) | Hari Ras Baithak | B Praak | Jaani | Kripa Record
snippet.description:
Kripa Record presents "Braj Ras" 

Hari Ras Baithak is a soulful Sankirtan experience where music becomes devotion and every note carries the divine name. In an intimate baithak setting, it invites you to pause, reflect, and immerse yourself in the bliss of bhakti.


Singer - B Praak
Composition - B Praak and Traditional 
Lyrics - Jaani and Traditonal 
Music - B Praak and Mir Desai 
Video - Prateek Thakur 

Spl Thanks - Yogi and Ananda for Shyam Sundar Lyrics 

Live rhythms arranged and performed by Krishna kishor & Team

Percussionists - 
K V Prasad 
Ganesh Rao 
Samual 
Rahul 
Recorded by Lijesh Kumar (Chennai) 

Carnatic Violin - Manas Kumar 
Ethnic Strokes - Tapas Roy 
Harmonium - Shibbu ji
AC Guitars and Bass - Shomu Seal 

Instruments Recorded at MidnightOwl Studios 

Chorus - Sudhanshu Shome and Team 

Boys 
Sudhanshu Shome 
Pankaj Dixit 
Mridul Ghosh

Girls 
Bhagyashree V Mhatre
Mayuri Kudalkar 
Pallavi roy

Recorded at Input One by Samir Dharap

Mixed and Mastered by Abhishek Ghatak


Creative Director - Piyush Thakur
DOP - Nanni Gill
Editor - Mayank Thapar 
Line Producer - Neeraj Bhatt ( Bhatt Production )
1st AD - Manik Thakur
Colourist - Aman Rajowal 
VFX - Gagan Matharoo 
Local LP - Arya Chaudhary
Choreographer - Sonu Arizona
Make up artist - Gill
Art Director - Rahul and Rohit
Creatives - Siddhesh Katkar

Team Kripa Record - Ankita

Digital Distribution - Universal Music
Project Head - Sahil Sharma 

Reach us at: Kriparecordsindia@gmail.com

(c) Universal Music Group

► About Kripa Record:

"Kripa Record" is a devotional music label dedicated to producing and promoting spiritual music that inspires profound experiences. "Kripa" meaning "grace" in Sanskrit, reflects the essence of divine mercy in the label's music. Kripa’s diverse devotional music is crafted by renowned artists, invoking peace, reverence, and spiritual awakening. It will serve as a cherished companion for meditation, prayer, and reflection.

snippet.title: 💫 एक भजन जो बदल दे आपकी किस्मत 🙏 सभी देवी-देवताओं की संयुक्त शक्ति 🙏 33 Koti Devta Blessings
snippet.description:
💫 एक भजन जो बदल दे आपकी किस्मत 🙏
सभी देवी-देवताओं की संयुक्त शक्ति | 33 Koti Devta Blessings Bhajan 2026

यह दिव्य भजन 33 कोटि देवी-देवताओं की संयुक्त ऊर्जा का स्मरण है,
जो आपके जीवन में सकारात्मक परिवर्तन, शांति और समृद्धि लाने में सहायक है।

✨ इस भजन के प्रभाव:
• मन को गहरी शांति और स्थिरता मिलती है
• जीवन में सकारात्मक ऊर्जा का प्रवाह बढ़ता है
• नकारात्मकता और तनाव धीरे-धीरे समाप्त होते हैं
• आत्मविश्वास और आध्यात्मिक शक्ति में वृद्धि होती है

💥 श्रद्धा से सुनें —
और अपने जीवन में दिव्य कृपा और बदलाव का अनुभव करें।

🎧 About This Bhajan:
यह भक्ति गीत AI (Artificial Intelligence) की सहायता से तैयार किया गया है,
जिसका उद्देश्य केवल भक्ति, श्रद्धा और आध्यात्मिक शांति फैलाना है।

🎶 Bhajan Details:
• Bhakti Geet (AI Generated)
• Voice: Artificial Intelligence (AI)
• Lyrics: Traditional
• Music & Composition: AI Tools
• Video & Thumbnail: Divya Darshan Bhakti

🙏 Support करें:
👍 Like करें
📢 Share करें
🔔 Channel को Subscribe करें और रोज़ ऐसे ही दिव्य भजन सुनें

snippet.title: Veni Vidi Vici (Video Song) | MOTHER PROMISE | Daali Dhananjaya | Gurukiran | Poorna Mysore
snippet.description:
#ROASTSONG #VENIVIDIVICI #MotherPromise

INT. ROSSI ADDA - NIGHT
Setting: RCB Trophy Winning Night. 3rd June 2025
The victory is sweet, but the roasts are ruthless.
Watch the boys of Rossi Adda turn the night into an absolute madhouse. They are celebrating the win and unapologetically roasting anyone foolish enough to cross Rossi. No holding back - just pure ROASTING.
Presenting the explosive first single from the upcoming quirky gangster drama, "Mother Promise".
Enjoy the song. Enjoy the vibe. The dance floor is officially open, and the comment section is all yours - let us know your favorite roast from the track!

Listen to “Veni Vidi Vici (From "Mother Promise")"(Daali Pictures)song on your favorite streaming platforms :-  

Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/album/0nXRrc7VszrnK93X078Z78
Apple Music - https://music.apple.com/us/album/veni-vidi-vici-from-mother-promise-single/1891747051
Amazon Music - https://music.amazon.com/albums/B0GWK5T8RY
JioSaavn - https://www.jiosaavn.com/album/veni-vidi-vici-from-mother-promise/c2PQ5cJkUk0_
iTunes - https://music.apple.com/us/album/veni-vidi-vici-from-mother-promise-single/1891747051
YouTube Music - https://music.youtube.com/playlist?list=OLAK5uy_lCZNWUCIFgyPiF7pi_AAn6zhhEIk0lsFQ
Gaana - https://gaana.com/album/veni-vidi-vici-from-mother-promise
Insta- https://www.instagram.com/reels/audio/957063186770680

Song Credits: 
Song Name - Veni Vedi Vici
Music Director - Navaneeth Sham 
Singer - Guru Kiran
Lyrics - Shashank Soghal
Music Production - Navaneeth Sham
Male Backing Vocals - Abhishek M R, Bhargav H C, Madhwesh Bharadwaj, Satvik S Rao, Shreyas B Rao, Navaneeth Sham
Guitars - Sanketh 
Percussion - Santhosh
Indian percussion - Shivamallu, Mallu Sudhan S
Additional Programming: Nandan Srinivas
Recording and Premix Engineer - Sandeep Kumar @RenuFilmStudios
Mixed & Mastered by - Sajay Kumar MP @RenuFilmStudios

Lyrics: 
Take a breath
Feel the win
Crown is out
Lock it in
ಬಡ್ಡಿಮಗಂದ್ victory smelling so good

ಇಷ್ಟು ವರ್ಷ ಇಟ್ಟುಕೊಂಡ
ಎದೆಯಾಳದ ಬೆಂಕಿಗೆ
ಎಣ್ಣೆ ಸುರಿದು ತಂಪು ಮಾಡು Damn good

ಉರ್ಕೊಳೋರ್ ಉರ್ಕೊಳಿ
ಬಡ್ಕೊಳೋರ್ ಬಡ್ಕೊಳಿ
ಕಿತ್ಕಳಕ್ಕೆ ಆಗದಿಲ್ಲ‌ ಏನೂ

ಸೋತಾಗ್ಲೇ ಬುಡ್ಲಿಲ್ಲ
ಗೆದ್ದಾಗ ಬುಡ್ತೀವಾ
ಇನ್ನು ಮುಂದೆ ಫುಲ್ಲು ನಮ್ದೇ Scene-ಉ!

ಅಂದರೂ, ನಿಮ್ಮ ಜೋಳ ಬೇಯೋದಿಲ್ಲ
Case-ಉ ಖತಮ್ ಮುಗೀತು ಆಟ

ಎಲ್ಲೋದ್ರೂ? ನುಗ್ಗಿದ್ದಾಯ್ತು, ಹೊಡೆದಿದ್ದಾಯ್ತು
ಗೆದ್ದಿದ್ದಾಯ್ತು, ಕೊಡ್ರೋ ಕಿರೀಟ..

ನಮ್ಮನ್ ಯಾರು, ನಮ್ಮನ್ ಯಾರೂ
ಕೆಣಕಬೇಡ್ರೋಲೆ
DNG ದೇವ್ರು ಮಾಡ್ತೀವಿ ಕಣ್ರಲೇ
ನಮ್ಮನ್ ಯಾರು, ನಮ್ಮನ್ ಯಾರೂ ಕೆಣಕಬೇಡ್ರೋಲೆ
ಹೇಳೋದು ಒಂದೇ ಸಲ ನಾವ್ ಒಳ್ಳೆ ಮಾತಲೇ

ಎದೆ ಎತ್ತು ತೊಡೆ ತಟ್ಟು ಬೆಂಗಳೂರು ನಮ್ದೇನೆ!
♪ Veni Vidi Vici ♪
♪ Veni Vidi Vici ♪

ಇವತ್ ನಮ್ದೇ ಅಂತ ನಮಗೆ ಗೊತ್ತಿತ್ತು ನೆನ್ನೇನೆ!
♪ Veni Vidi Vici ♪
♪ Ve-veni... Vi-vidi... Vici-ci ♪


ನಮ್ದೆ ಜಗತ್ತು, ನಾವೆ ಗೆದ್ದೆತ್ತು
ಬಾಲ‌ ಹಿಡ್ಕಳಿ, ನಮ್ನ ಫಾಲೋ‌ ಮಾಡ್ಕಳಿ
ಬಡವರ ಮಕ್ಳ ಮೇಲೇನೇ Bet ಮಾಡ್ತೀವಿ
ಪಣ‌ ತೊಡ್ತಿವಿ, ನಮ್ದೊಂದ್ ಪಡೆ‌ ಕಟ್ತಿವಿ

ನೀರ್ ಕುಡ್ದಂಗೆ Winning
Success ಹಿಂದೆ‌ ನೋ‌ running
Boys ಜೊತೆ full chilling
AURA FARMING!

Haters ಹೊಟ್ಟೆ burning
ನಮ್ಮ status growing
ಎಷ್ಟ್ರಲ್ ಇರ್ಬೇಕ್ ಅಷ್ಟ್ರಲ್ ಇರ್ಬೇಕ್
ಇದೆ last warning!

ಅಂದರೂ, ನಿಮ್ಮ ಜೋಳ ಬೇಯೋದಿಲ್ಲ
Case ಖತಮ್ ಮುಗೀತು ಆಟ

ಎಲ್ಲೋದ್ರೂ? ನುಗ್ಗಿದ್ದಾಯ್ತು, ಹೊಡೆದಿದ್ದಾಯ್ತು
ಗೆದ್ದಿದ್ದಾಯ್ತು, ಕೊಡ್ರೊ ಕಿರೀಟ..

ನಮ್ಮನ್ ಯಾರು, ನಮ್ಮನ್ ಯಾರೂ ಕೆಣಕಬ್ಯಾಡ್ರಲೇ
DNG ದೇವ್ರು ಮಾಡ್ತಿವಿ ಕಣ್ರಲೇ

ನಮ್ಮನ್ ಯಾರು, ನಮ್ಮನ್ ಯಾರೂ, ಕೆಣಕಬೇಡ್ರಲೇ
LKG ಚಿಂಟು kids sideಗ್ ನಿಲ್ರೊಲೆ

ಸರಿ final ಹೇಳ್ಬುಡು ಭೈ
ಯಾರಪ್ಪಂದ್ ಏನೈತಿ Pan India ನಮ್ದೈತಿ
♪ Veni Vidi Vici ♪
♪ Veni Vidi Vici ♪

Nature-ಏ ಹೇಳೈತಿ Future-ಉ ನಮ್ದೈತಿ
♪ Veni Vidi Vici ♪
♪ Ve-veni... Vi-vidi... Vici-ci ♪
ನುಗ್ಗಿದ್ದಾಯ್ತು… ಹೊಡೆದಿದ್ದಾಯ್ತು…

ಬಡವರ ಮಕ್ಳ ಮೇಲೇನೇ Bet ಮಾಡ್ತೀವಿ
ಪಣ‌ ತೊಡ್ತಿವಿ, ನಮ್ದೊಂದ್ ಪಡೆ‌ ಕಟ್ತಿವಿ

ನೀರ್ ಕುಡ್ದಂಗೆ Winning
Success ಹಿಂದೆ‌ ನೋ‌ running
Boys ಜೊತೆ full chilling
AURA FARMING!

Haters ಹೊಟ್ಟೆ burning
ನಮ್ಮ status growing
ಎಷ್ಟ್ರಲ್ ಇರ್ಬೇಕ್ ಅಷ್ಟ್ರಲ್ ಇರ್ಬೇಕ್
ಇದೆ last warning!

ಅಂದರೂ, ನಿಮ್ಮ ಜೋಳ ಬೇಯೋದಿಲ್ಲ
Case ಖತಮ್ ಮುಗೀತು ಆಟ

ಎಲ್ಲೋದ್ರೂ? ನುಗ್ಗಿದ್ದಾಯ್ತು, ಹೊಡೆದಿದ್ದಾಯ್ತು
ಗೆದ್ದಿದ್ದಾಯ್ತು, ಕೊಡ್ರೊ ಕಿರೀಟ..

ನಮ್ಮನ್ ಯಾರು, ನಮ್ಮನ್ ಯಾರೂ ಕೆಣಕಬ್ಯಾಡ್ರಲೇ
DNG ದೇವ್ರು ಮಾಡ್ತಿವಿ ಕಣ್ರಲೇ

ನಮ್ಮನ್ ಯಾರು, ನಮ್ಮನ್ ಯಾರೂ, ಕೆಣಕಬೇಡ್ರಲೇ
LKG ಚಿಂಟು kids sideಗ್ ನಿಲ್ರೊಲೆ

ಸರಿ final ಹೇಳ್ಬುಡು ಭೈ
ಯಾರಪ್ಪಂದ್ ಏನೈತಿ Pan India ನಮ್ದೈತಿ
♪ Veni Vidi Vici ♪
♪ Veni Vidi Vici ♪

Nature-ಏ ಹೇಳೈತಿ Future-ಉ ನಮ್ದೈತಿ
♪ Veni Vidi Vici ♪
♪ Ve-veni... Vi-vidi... Vici-ci ♪
ನುಗ್ಗಿದ್ದಾಯ್ತು… ಹೊಡೆದಿದ್ದಾಯ್ತು…

en.description:
#ROASTSONG #VENIVIDIVICI #MotherPromise

INT. ROSSI ADDA - NIGHT
Setting: RCB Trophy Winning Night. 3rd June 2025
The victory is sweet, but the roasts are ruthless.
Watch the boys of Rossi Adda turn the night into an absolute madhouse. They are celebrating the win and unapologetically roasting anyone foolish enough to cross Rossi. No holding back - just pure ROASTING.
Presenting the explosive first single from the upcoming quirky gangster drama, "Mother Promise".
Enjoy the song. Enjoy the vibe. The dance floor is officially open, and the comment section is all yours - let us know your favorite roast from the track!

snippet.title: The BGIS Champions Unfiltered: Team Soul's Secret to Victory: The W Club Ep. 01
snippet.description:
The Grind. The Glory. The W.
Welcome to the premiere episode of The W Club, where we sit down with the biggest names in gaming and sports to uncover the mindset behind the wins. To kick things off, I’m joined by the reigning BGIS Champions- Team Soul.
In this episode, we’re going beyond the scoreboard. We dive deep into the team’s journey to the top, the high-pressure moments that defined their championship run, and what it really takes to stay at the pinnacle of Indian Esports. From internal team dynamics to the strategies that outclassed the competition, no topic is off-limits.
In this episode:
* The Road to BGIS: How they prepared for the biggest stage in Indian gaming.
* Team Dynamics: The chemistry between Nakul, Goblin, Joker, Legit, Thunder, and Coach Ayogi.
* Soul-Ful Rapid Fire: Quick questions, spicy answers, and some behind-the-scenes secrets.
Whether you’re an aspiring pro player or a die-hard Soul fan, this is the blueprint for excellence.
Subscribe to join the club and never miss an episode.
make sure to follow the boys on youtube as well!

Joker: https://www.youtube.com/@UCM9CUv3h0pqozBCK41XX51Q 
Goblin: https://www.youtube.com/@UCfbS6xFS5pKesagI6xIQOyw 
Nakul: https://www.youtube.com/@UCEj__rdZ2W5NWP_e_AWhyXQ 
Legit: https://www.youtube.com/@UC0HPBh_9SaO8mc3tB1prZCg 
Thunder: https://www.youtube.com/@UCh5i4NFDM1zoAbOjBK7uuCQ 
Ayogi: https://www.youtube.com/@UCj8Ta2dWOQxdaZI0Qyi8KWw 
#TheWClub #TeamSoul #BGIS #Esports #BGMI #Gaming

Telangana Folk Devotional songs
Lyrics: Maddiveni Srinivas
Listen to the powerful Saturday Venkateswara Swamy Songs – including the divine chant Om Namo Venkateshaya, a sacred mantra dedicated to Lord Venkateswara Swamy (Tirumala Balaji). These Lord Venkateswara Folk Songs Telugu bring peace, positivity, and spiritual energy into your life.

Chanting Om Namo Venkateshaya and listening to Venkateswara devotional songs on Saturday is believed to remove obstacles, reduce negativity, and bless devotees with prosperity, success, and happiness. Experience the divine grace of Lord Balaji through these beautiful Telugu bhakti songs.
